title: Project kickoff preferences

options.markdown:
### TypeScript

Full-stack web with strong typing and a huge ecosystem.

```ts
const greet = (name: string) => `hi ${name}`;
```

### Go

Fast, simple, and great for services and CLIs.

### Rust

Memory-safe systems language with a steeper learning curve.

### Python

Ubiquitous for scripting, data, and ML.
